meaning: n.祖传的财物,<喻>继承物,遗产
examples: These archaeological findings are part of the national patrimony.
I left my parents' house, relinquished my estate and my patrimony.
Recoverable pecuniary damage is a diminution of the victim's patrimony caused by the damaging event.
Much of the patrimony, however, is owned by a foundation and cannot be sold.
But it is certainly time for Peru to make more of its potato patrimony.
